title: eruca sativa subsp. vesicaria
intro: Eruca sativa subsp. vesicaria, also known as garden rocket or wild rocket, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its rich content of vitamins, minerals, and other nutrients. Eruca sativa subsp. vesicaria can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its health benefits.
